'''rahuvu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:placidness|placidness]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-h-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:placidness|placidness]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| rahuvu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ræhivith|ræhivith]] || [[word:ræhivij|ræhivij]] || [[word:ræhivish|ræhivish]] || [[word:ræhivi|ræhivi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:rahuhuvuth|rahuhuvuth]] || [[word:rahuhuvuj|rahuhuvuj]] || [[word:rahuhuvush|rahuhuvush]] || [[word:rahuhuvu|rahuhuvu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:rahuvuth|rahuvuth]] || [[word:rahuvuj|rahuvuj]] || [[word:rahuvush|rahuvush]] || [[word:rahuvu|rahuvu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:rahufvuth|rahufvuth]] || [[word:rahufvuj|rahufvuj]] || [[word:rahufvush|rahufvush]] || [[word:rahufvuf|rahufvuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:rahuvuthu|rahuvuthu]] || [[word:rahuvuju|rahuvuju]] || [[word:rahuvushu|rahuvushu]] || [[word:rahuvuku|rahuvuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:rahuvuth|rahuvuth]] || [[word:rahuvuj|rahuvuj]] || [[word:rahuvush|rahuvush]] || [[word:rahuvu|rahuvu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:rahuvuthul|rahuvuthul]] || [[word:rahuvujul|rahuvujul]] || [[word:rahuvushul|rahuvushul]] || [[word:rahuvukul|rahuvukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:rahuvuthuthu|rahuvuthuthu]] || [[word:rahuvujuju|rahuvujuju]] || [[word:rahuvushushu|rahuvushushu]] || [[word:rahuvuku|rahuvuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:rahuvuthun|rahuvuthun]] || [[word:rahuvujun|rahuvujun]] || [[word:rahuvushun|rahuvushun]] || [[word:rahuvukun|rahuvukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:rahuvuthuoro|rahuvuthuoro]] || [[word:rahuvujuoro|rahuvujuoro]] || [[word:rahuvushuoro|rahuvushuoro]] || [[word:rahuvukuoro|rahuvukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
